name: Winston Lin
title: Product, AI, and systems work
tagline: I work across AI, infrastructure, and business systems, from developer platforms and serverless to operations and transformation.
meta_description: Winston Lin writes about AI workflows, developer platforms, infrastructure, and business systems, with case studies from OCI Functions, Kubernetes, and CI/CD.
intro_paragraphs: Most of my work sits between product, infrastructure, and execution. I’ve led product work across CI/CD, Kubernetes, and serverless, mostly inside OCI.
Outside core cloud work, I also advise businesses on AI, operations, and transformation, and invest in operating businesses across Taiwan, Hong Kong, Singapore, and the US.
experience_highlights: Principal Product Manager for OCI Functions, focused on developer experience and execution model
Previously led product work across OCI Kubernetes Engine and OCI DevOps / CI/CD
Built internal platform capabilities that shortened delivery cycles and reduced operational drag
